title: Status of terms
summary: 9084 Contract — conditions, warranties, innominate terms, and remedies for breach.
learningObjectives: Classify terms by status and importance.
Explain effect of breaching each type.
Analyse Hong Kong Fir approach to innominate terms.
Apply remedies: termination vs damages only.

simpleExplanation.title: Not all promises are equal
simpleExplanation.summary: Breaching a condition lets the innocent party end the contract; breaching a warranty only allows damages — innominate terms depend on consequences.
steps: Condition — Poussard v Spiers; repudiatory breach.
Warranty — Bettini v Gye; damages only.
Innominate — Hong Kong Fir; look at breach effect.
Anticipatory breach — Hochster v De La Tour.

sections.content: **Status of terms** (3.2.3) — link **classification → breach → remedy** in every answer.

sections.label: Mark a status of terms question
